name: Nathania Anneta
description:
Nathania Anneta, exclusively known as Nia or Neta, is a Yuuki’s new assistant developer, actress and model that often helps Yuuki to test new features in Lyra before they’re released to the public.

In addition to her work as a developer, Nia is also known for her captivating performances and stunning looks when she become the photogenic champion of Kediri Regency in 2025. With her unique blend of technical expertise and creative talent, Nia is a valuable asset to the Lyra team and a rising star in the entertainment industry.

name: Carin Miracle
description:
Carin Miracle, known as her stage name 'crshyle', is a member in Lyra who joined the dancer team named 'ST☆RGΛINZ' placed in Kediri Regency, East Java.
She is known as Jessica Noleen's friend at the same school. Not much is known about her, but she is often seen in the background of Lyra's development and is rumored to have a significant role in the future of the project.
badges: 3rd place Winner of School Contest Dance 2025🏆🥉

name: Jessica Noleen Alka
description:
'I'm a gentle person on the outside, but I have a lot of ideas that I want to realize and share with others,' that's what Jessica said.

Jessica Noleen Alka, also known as Jessica, is a music producer and artist who is currently the owner of this website. She contributed by creating original music and sound effects for the project. She is known for her unique style and ability to create immersive audio experiences that enhance the overall user experience of Lyra.

name: Monique Tri Tunggadewi
description: Monique is Noleen and Carin's first friend at school. She is a student and contributor to Lyra who is passionate about fashion, design, and creativity.

name: Rhiannon Ava Mae
description: Mae is Noleen and Carin's second friend at school. Known as her extroverted nature and infectious laughter, Mae is a student and contributor to Lyra who is passionate about performing arts, music, and entertainment.

name: Miracel Charis Gracia
description: This character is coming soon. Stay tune!

name: Reagan Putra Lobis
description: Reagan is the co-developer of Lyra Chic. He is known as a member of the student council's sports section and possesses strong leadership and social skills at school.
